chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-445 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of M.A No.7281/2025 (return of surety) 28.11.2025. Mr.Junaid Jabbar, Advocate for applicant/surety ****** In the light of Order dated 11.8.2025, passed by the Family/Guardian Judge-II, Hyderabad, passed in G.A No.3102025, whereby Guardianship application was allowed by mutual compromise, therefore, the surety furnished in compliance of Order dated 16.7.2025, the listed application is disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to the applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
